chunks.text:
Voogaly Carpet Care — Professional carpet care service in Garland. Services:
- Carpet cleaning
- Upholstery cleaning
- Tile and grout cleaning
- Area rug cleaning
- Stain removal

Contact Information:
- Phone: (214) 240-7487
- Email: contrerasb@voogaly. com
- Address: 2326 S Jupiter Rd, Garland, TX 75041
- Website: http://www. voogaly. com/
- Service Area: Garland, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 5 stars with 102 reviews.
